site.title: Buildaburger
site.tagline: A polymath's index of thought projects, sorted by doneness.

burgers.title: Horizon Risk Assessment
burgers.summary: An eight-dimension scoring instrument for community bank survival risk over a ten-year horizon. Self-contained HTML tool with Export/Import JSON, built to be sat in front of an executive team without a consultant in the room.

burgers.title: Self-Defining Language
burgers.summary: A typed term algebra where a word is a well-formed nested expression and meaning is fully recoverable from form — the spelling is the definition. Four closed types, full taxonomic decomposition as a hard commitment, a first kinship domain worked to normal form. Natural languages are treated as lossy projections below the algebra, with universal translation emergent and undecidability preserved as a feature via the equational choice.

burgers.title: Growth-Indexed Taxation
burgers.summary: A multiplier-based federal tax framework anchored to BEA Type II industry accounts. Five tiers, a secondary passive-income schedule, and a written rebuttal to the nationalization objection.

burgers.title: The Multiplier Model
burgers.summary: Tools amplify skill distributions rather than democratizing them. Everyone has to be an expert on at least one endpoint. Extended into a row model mapping institutional roles across trigger, discovery, transformation, trajectory, and flourishing outcome.

burgers.title: The Cartograph
burgers.summary: A gazetteer of frameworks. 747+ entries across 23 disciplines, sorted into eight rigor bands, lineage-linked, lightly annotated. Shipped as a live static site.

burgers.title: Given by Göller
burgers.summary: Three handbags from Platonic geometry — cube, sphere, tetrahedron — with handle cutouts in a closed three-way rotation. Sold only as sets of three. Distribution by gallery ceremony, not catalog.

burgers.title: The Opacity Thesis
burgers.summary: Agency, intelligence, and choice as attributions observers make into gaps in mechanism-visibility, grounded in Chaitin's undecidability. Demonstrated through the Light Switch Test. Publication kit complete, awaiting Zenodo → GitHub → PhilArchive → LessWrong push.

burgers.title: Independence Hall
burgers.summary: A blind political alignment quiz that matches voters to six party platforms across 22 sub-domains. Four-point forced choice, calibration-validated for neutrality (39-39 cross-party symmetry). Includes the Chestnut Street Declaration — a candidate-facing self-declaration sub-brand.

burgers.title: The Org Impact Mapper
burgers.summary: Two-axis framework — External Impact × Organizational Leverage — resolving every organizational seat into Catalyst, Rainmaker, Linchpin, or Sustainer. Companion to the Alignment of Judgment work.

burgers.title: The Alignment of Judgment
burgers.summary: Role discretion, discretion capacity, and authority as the three objects whose convergence defines a healthy working relationship. Includes a scoring instrument, a manager's wizard, and the Six-Type Audit for executive self-assessment.

burgers.title: The CSI / Metavante Read
burgers.summary: Reading CSI's Centerbridge / Langer trajectory as the Metavante playbook, and what that means for community banks tied to NuPoint. A thesis, not an artifact — but a load-bearing one for how PremierBank thinks about its core.

burgers.title: Radial Transducer & Tesla Shell
burgers.summary: Carbon-fiber breathing-ring drivers approximating MBL-style omnidirectional dispersion at a fraction of the cost. Plus a reverse-horn Tesla-valve rear-wave absorber as the buildable near-term experiment.

burgers.title: The Granite Flywheel Power Supply
burgers.summary: An isolated flywheel-based power supply for high-end analog audio. Granite column, carbon-fiber rim, multiple galvanically-isolated outputs. Physics worked out end to end; single-output turntable supply as V1.

burgers.title: The Change Readiness Quotient
burgers.summary: A framework and formula for scoring an organization's readiness to observe and respond to change events across domains, with the observer's position in the pipeline treated as the hidden variable that most instrumentation-focused approaches miss.

burgers.title: The Generator Thesis
burgers.summary: Creative capacity as shaper × generator (× hardware substrate in physical domains). The generator cannot be trained because generation has no error signal. Grounded in Kolmogorov complexity, stress-tested across six domains.

burgers.title: The Macrocycle Hypothesis
burgers.summary: A Turchin-derived structural-demographic reading of the 2020s that identifies 1900 (not 1970) as the structural twin, with the non-kinetic export valve as the master variable. Includes the Lifeboat Capitalism and Tiering framings.

burgers.title: The Bank Balance-Sheet Weather Platform
burgers.summary: Agent-based bank simulation grounded in a specific bank's transaction data at individual-account granularity. NOAA-style ensemble modeling of open-world natural-language scenarios. Distinct from central bank cohort models. Career-positioning project.

burgers.title: Quantum Gravity & the Limits of Mathematics
burgers.summary: Is QM/GR irreconcilability a hard limit of our axiomatic foundations, a missing-but-reachable mathematics, or just the wrong toolkit? Sharpened to one falsifiable calorimetry experiment as the only piece earning its keep.

burgers.title: The Two-Mode Universe
burgers.summary: Cosmological speculation. Reality runs in two modes — unrendered (cheap quantum potential) and rendered (classical, substrate cost paid) — with dark matter as the observable signature of the substrate. Breaks on the causality direction; may partially survive under a Wolfram reading.

burgers.title: The Backward-Facing Observer
burgers.summary: A phenomenological reframe. Holding the future as tehom (formless, unknowable) rather than as extrapolation. Changes the felt problem of decision-making from choosing between predictions to choosing which direction to face when the unknowable arrives.

burgers.title: The Radar Projection Installation
burgers.summary: A vintage box camera on a wooden surveyor's tripod, housing a pico projector, displaying live NOAA radar imagery onto a 1931 paper map of Wisconsin. Current weather crossing past geography — the mismatch is the piece.

burgers.title: The Goetic Seals Investigation
burgers.summary: Do the 72 seals of the Lesser Key of Solomon encode extractable information under standard image-analysis transforms? Asymmetry-distribution test as the opening move. Nothing supernatural claimed — the question is whether the humans who designed them encoded structure.

burgers.title: The Mono Audio POC
burgers.summary: For compromised listening conditions, a properly-derived mono may beat broken stereo. Coherence-weighted M/S summation with decorrelated Side re-injection. Scoped to a Raspberry Pi + HiFiBerry HAT proof of concept.

burgers.title: Siderophile
burgers.summary: Speculative fiction — a K-Pg-boundary civilization whose collapse produced the iridium layer. Dual-timeline structure intercutting the ancient story with a modern scientist studying siderophile elements. Same question as Hephaestion's Tomb at civilization scale.

burgers.title: Hephaestion's Tomb
burgers.summary: A group of friends run a lifelong contest — the greatest life gets a statue after they all pass. The book ends without telling the reader who won. Jungian archetypes as the scoring system the characters don't know they're being judged on. Same question as Siderophile at single-life scale.

burgers.title: The Pre-Extinction Mythology
burgers.summary: A mythology project drawing on tehom, the Emerald Tablet, and rabbinic cosmology as source materials for a message-across-mass-extinctions tradition. The value is in designing what such a message would need to say, not in producing the document itself.

burgers.title: The Four-Space Cognition Model
burgers.summary: Self-model of cognition: answer-ready / computing / unanswerable / question-generating (tehom). The fourth region felt as presence, historically as burden, reframed in coaching as gift. Public per the site's therapeutic-offloading rationale.

burgers.title: KWML & the Interior Work
burgers.summary: Coaching work using Moore & Gillette's archetypal framework. May or may not belong on a public site — held here as a placeholder while that question stays open.
